title: NICE NG28 2024 update: therapy sequencing after metformin
text: For adults with type 2 diabetes and chronic kidney disease, NICE NG28 prioritizes SGLT2 inhibitors after metformin when renal function and clinical context allow.

title: ADA Standards of Care 2025: obesity-aware escalation after metformin
text: ADA Standards of Care 2025 support GLP-1 receptor agonists when additional weight loss and cardiometabolic benefit are priorities after metformin.
